high_fn_cost.definition: True if fn_cost_level is high/very_high, policy marks regulated_compliance=true, or the local false-negative/false-reject cost ratio is at or above locally recalibrated lambda_star_local.
high_fn_cost.note: The pooled diagnostic reference lambda approximately 3.55 is a cold-start illustration only and is not a universal predicate threshold. For benign-heavy deployment traffic, use a prevalence-adjusted local estimate.

safety_critical_domain.definition: True for construction safety, maintenance, industrial compliance, regulated financial/medical/operational records, or locally designated safety-critical workflows.

strict_frr_tolerance.definition: True when false rejects must be recovered through human review, manual escalation, or strict operational queue management.

mandatory_review.definition: True for explicit policy categories that require human review regardless of RiskScore, including legal/regulatory hold, incident-response records, or local policy conflict.
